tool_args.label: TBTA CRZ Bond Resolution Staff Summary

payload.title: Congestion Relief Zone Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution
payload.description: Staff Summary and draft TBTA Board resolution seeking ratification of the CRZ Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution, including Master Glossary of Terms and Standard Resolution Provisions, to finance approved Capital Program transit and commuter projects.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority (TBTA)

payload.description: Body corporate and politic constituting a public benefit corporation organized and existing under the laws of the State of New York. Issuer of the CRZ Toll Revenue Obligations.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)

payload.description: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority, organized under the MTA Act. Its Finance Department is seeking TBTA Board ratification of the CRZ Bond Resolution.

tool_args.label: MTA Capital Program Review Board (CPRB)

payload.entity_name: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Capital Program Review Board
payload.description: Created pursuant to Section 1269-a of the MTA Act. Reviews and approves certain resolutions including the CRZ Bond Resolution.

tool_args.label: New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT)

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation
payload.description: Party to the City MOU with TBTA regarding the CRZ Tolling Program.

tool_args.label: Central Business District Tolling Program (CRZ Tolling Program)

payload.description: CRZ Tolling Program established pursuant to the Traffic Mobility Act. Requires TBTA to establish and operate the CRZ Tolling Program and charge variable tolls for vehicles entering the Congestion Relief Zone. Program went into effect on January 5, 2025. Required to generate net annual revenues over time to fund $15 billion for MTA transit and commuter rail system capital projects.

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.
project.owner is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Owner is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: owned_by.

tool_args.label: TBTA Board adopted initial CRZ toll structure and rates

payload.description: The TBTA Board adopted the initial CRZ toll structure and rates, known as the CRZ Initial Toll Rate Schedule.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: TBTA Board adopted phase-in approach to CRZ toll rate schedule

payload.description: The TBTA Board adopted a phase-in approach to the CRZ toll rate schedule.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program went into effect and tolling commenced

payload.description: The CRZ Tolling Program went into effect and tolling commenced.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: TBTA submitted draft CRZ Bond Resolution to CPRB

payload.description: TBTA submitted the draft CRZ Bond Resolution to the CPRB for review and approval.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: CPRB approved CRZ Bond Resolution

payload.description: The draft CRZ Bond Resolution was approved by the CPRB.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: TBTA Board sought approval of CRZ Bond Resolution

payload.description: TBTA Board approval sought for the CRZ Bond Resolution, including subordinated obligations and activities in connection with the issuance of bonds and notes under the CRZ Bond Resolution.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program required to generate net annual revenues for $15B in capital projects

payload.claim_text: The Traffic Mobility Act requires the CRZ Tolling Program to generate net annual revenues over time to fund $15 billion for MTA's transit and commuter rail system capital projects.
payload.subject: CRZ Tolling Program

tool_args.label: CRZ Net Revenues deposited into MTA capital lockbox fund

payload.claim_text: After payment of certain costs of operating and administering the CRZ Tolling Program, the tolls, fees and other charges generated under the CRZ Tolling Program (the CRZ Net Revenues) are deposited into the MTA capital lockbox fund and are permitted to be pledged by TBTA to secure and be applied to the payment of bonds, notes or other obligations of TBTA.
payload.subject: CRZ Net Revenues

tool_args.label: TBTA expects to issue bonds over several years

payload.claim_text: TBTA expects to issue bonds and notes secured by CRZ Net Revenues over several years to match MTA's capital funding needs.
payload.subject: TBTA

tool_args.label: CRZ Program Phase-In Period defined

payload.claim_text: CRZ Program Phase-In Period shall mean the period from January 5, 2025 through December 31, 2033.
payload.subject: CRZ Tolling Program

tool_args.label: Operating Expenses cap for environmental monitoring

payload.claim_text: Operating Expenses include payment of environmental monitoring and mitigation costs for a total amount not to exceed $150,000,000 of out-of-pocket costs.
payload.subject: CRZ Tolling Program

tool_args.label: CRZ Toll Rate Covenant during phase-in period

payload.claim_text: During the CRZ Program Phase-In Period, the Issuer shall establish, levy, maintain and collect such tolls sufficient to produce CRZ Pledged Net Toll Revenues not less than projected to be generated by the CRZ Initial Toll Rate Schedule. After the CRZ Program Phase-In Period, at rates sufficient to produce CRZ Toll Revenues at least equal to the greater of the Senior Lien Minimum Revenue Requirement and the Aggregate Minimum Revenue Requirement.
payload.subject: CRZ Tolling Program

tool_args.label: Senior Lien Minimum Revenue Requirement definition

payload.claim_text: Senior Lien Minimum Revenue Requirement shall mean, for each calendar year, the sum of (i) Operating Expenses and (ii) 125% of Calculated Debt Service on all Senior Lien Indebtedness.
payload.subject: CRZ Tolling Program

tool_args.label: Required Rate Study Coverage Level definition

payload.claim_text: Required Rate Study Coverage Level shall mean the greater of: (1) the sum of Operating Expenses and 150% of Calculated Debt Service on all Senior Lien Indebtedness, and (2) the sum of Operating Expenses and 110% of Calculated Debt Service on all Senior Lien and Subordinate Lien Indebtedness.
payload.subject: CRZ Tolling Program

tool_args.label: Delegation of authority to Authorized Officers

payload.claim_text: TBTA Board approval is sought delegating authority to the Chairman, the Chief Financial Officer or the Deputy Chief, Financial Services of MTA, or their designees (Authorized Officers) to make revisions to the CRZ Bond Resolution as necessary or convenient and to award CRZ Obligations.
payload.subject: TBTA Board

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program - initial toll adoption timeline event

payload.description: The TBTA Board adopted the initial CRZ toll structure and rates under the CRZ Tolling Program.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program - phase-in adoption timeline event

payload.description: The TBTA Board adopted a phase-in approach to the CRZ toll rate schedule under the CRZ Tolling Program.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program - tolling commenced timeline event

payload.description: The CRZ Tolling Program went into effect and tolling commenced.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program - bond resolution submitted to CPRB timeline event

payload.description: TBTA submitted the draft CRZ Bond Resolution to the CPRB for review and approval.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program - CPRB approved bond resolution timeline event

payload.description: The draft CRZ Bond Resolution was approved by the CPRB.

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program - TBTA board approval sought timeline event

payload.description: TBTA Board approval sought for the CRZ Bond Resolution.

tool_args.label: TBTA issues bonds to finance MTA transit and commuter projects

payload.description: TBTA can issue bonds and notes to finance approved Capital Program transit and commuter projects for MTA.

tool_args.label: CPRB reviews TBTA bond resolution

payload.description: The CPRB reviews and approves certain resolutions submitted by TBTA, including the CRZ Bond Resolution.

tool_args.label: TBTA and NYCDOT City MOU

payload.description: TBTA entered into a Memorandum of Understanding with NYCDOT dated June 11, 2019, in accordance with Section 1704(2-a) of the New York Vehicle and Traffic Law.

tool_args.label: MTA Finance Department seeks TBTA Board ratification

payload.description: The MTA Finance Department is seeking TBTA Board ratification of the CRZ Bond Resolution.

tool_args.label: TBTA operates CRZ Tolling Program

payload.description: TBTA establishes and operates the CRZ Tolling Program as required by the Traffic Mobility Act.

tool_args.label: $15 billion in transit and commuter rail capital projects

payload.scope: MTA transit and commuter rail system capital projects
payload.description: The CRZ Tolling Program is required to generate net annual revenues over time to fund $15 billion for MTA's transit and commuter rail system capital projects.

tool_args.label: $150 million cap on environmental monitoring costs

payload.description: Operating Expenses include environmental monitoring and mitigation costs for a total amount not to exceed $150,000,000 of out-of-pocket costs (excluding the value of discounts constituting mitigation).

tool_args.label: Senior Lien Debt Service Coverage Ratio 125%

payload.description: Senior Lien Minimum Revenue Requirement equals 125% of Calculated Debt Service on Senior Lien Indebtedness plus Operating Expenses.

tool_args.label: Rate Study Coverage Level 150% senior / 110% aggregate

payload.raw_value_text: 150% of Calculated Debt Service on Senior Lien Indebtedness / 110% of Calculated Debt Service on Senior Lien and Subordinate Lien Indebtedness
payload.description: Required Rate Study Coverage Level is the greater of: (1) Operating Expenses + 150% of Senior Lien Calculated Debt Service, and (2) Operating Expenses + 110% of Senior Lien and Subordinate Lien Calculated Debt Service.

tool_args.label: Jaibala Patel, Chief Financial Officer, MTA

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program has claim - $15B capital funding requirement

payload.description: The CRZ Tolling Program is required to fund $15 billion for MTA capital projects.
